bugs.title: List set to 'Anyone (readonly)' cannot be reverted, renamed, or modified

results.title: Create Wishlist/List
results.notes: Form: Name (required, 25-char max), Description (250-char counter), Sharing options (Private default + Anyone(readonly), Organization). List 'AGENT-TEST-Sum2026' created.

results.title: Add Product to List from PDP
results.notes: Heart icon labeled 'Add to list' on PDP. Modal 'Please select list' w/ checkboxes + 'Add new list' inline. Heart flips to 'In the list' --active.

results.title: Add Product to List from Category Page
results.notes: Add to list button on each product card. URL stays on category; affected card flips to 'In the list'.

results.title: View List Contents
results.notes: Table grid (Product image+name, Properties, Price per item). Per-row qty input, Update cart, X. Page-level: SAVE CHANGES, LIST SETTINGS, ADD ALL TO CART, BUY NOW. Caveats: 'In Stock' label and creation date not on detail page; only on /account/lists tile.

results.title: Add to Cart from List
results.notes: Per-row 'Add to cart' increments cart. 'Add all to cart' opens result modal: 'Successfully added N' with SKU/name/qty table. Items remain in list after cart add.

results.title: Remove Product from List
results.notes: Confirm Delete dialog. data-test-id='remove-item-button'. Minor i18n issue: aria-label is 'Remove from cart' on a list page (should be 'Remove from list').

results.title: Rename/Edit List
results.notes: Renamed Sum1 → Sum2026; h1 + page title updated. WARNING: shared lists block rename — see BUG-007-001.

results.title: Delete List
results.notes: All 3 test lists deleted via kebab menu Delete option. Confirm Delete dialog: 'Are you sure you want to remove the [name] list?'. Catalog unaffected — products still accessible via PDP. NOTE: confirmation dialog does NOT include item count (CSV expected 'X items will be removed').

results.title: Share List (Public Link)
results.notes: Setting Sharing→'Anyone (readonly)' generates public URL /shared-list/{guid} in settings dialog Link textbox + copy button. Opening link renders read-only list (h1, products, order summary; NO add-to-cart/settings/buy-now). NOTE: differs from CSV — no separate 'Get Public Link' button; sharing is exposed as a privacy mode + copyable Link.

results.title: Share List via Email
results.notes: No email-share UI present. Settings dialog only exposes a copyable Link textbox; recipient email field, optional message, Send button do not exist. Functionality not implemented in storefront.

results.title: Mark List Private/Shared
results.notes: Toggle Private→Anyone(readonly) works (badge changes to Shared). Reverse toggle BLOCKED — once shared, all settings fields disable (name, description, sharing combobox, Save). See BUG-007-001.

results.title: Product Already in List Indicator
results.notes: Heart icon flipped to 'In the list' --active. Clicking opens dialog with 'Already in the lists' section showing list (with Shared/Private badge) + checked checkbox. Duplicate add prevented via checkbox state. NOTE: tooltip is generic 'In the list' — not list name like 'In Summer Essentials'.

results.title: Move Product Between Lists
results.notes: No dedicated 'Move to...' menu, but multi-select checkboxes (uncheck source + check target + Save) achieve move. Verified Coca Cola moved Sum2026→WishB; source list shows empty state. No duplicate.

results.title: List - Out of Stock Product Handling
results.notes: Requires Admin SPA setup to mark product OOS within available test catalog. Recommend dedicated test data fixture.

results.title: GA4 add_to_wishlist Event
results.notes: Verified GA4 collect call: en=add_to_wishlist, cu=USD, pr1=id<sku>~nm<name>~pr<price>~ds0~qt<qty>~ca<cat>, epn.value=<price>. Event fires on add action.

results.title: Create Shared List (Org)
results.notes: AGENT-TEST-Team created with Sharing=Organization. Shows 'Shared' badge with people icon. NOTE: badge identical for 'Anyone (readonly)' and 'Organization' — no visual differentiation between modes (potential UX gap).

results.title: Org Member Sees Shared List
results.notes: Requires User B in same BuildRight org. agent-user-pool slot 3 has 'same_org_pair: none'. Recommend seeding a 2nd BuildRight user.

results.title: Add to Shared List (User B)
results.notes: Requires User B in same org.

results.title: Private List Not Visible to Org Members
results.notes: Requires User B in same org.

results.title: Saved for Later - View and Move Items Back to Cart
results.notes: Page loads, items show with image/name/price/qty/Add to cart/X. After clicking 'Add to cart', cart count increments, but item was NOT removed from Saved for Later (move-vs-copy semantics). Button label is 'Add to cart' (not 'Move to Cart') — behavior matches label, contradicts test case expectation. Recommend renaming button or implementing move.

results.title: Saved for Later - Remove Item & Empty State
results.notes: Confirm Delete dialog. Item removes immediately (no reload). When list empty: 'Your list is empty / Continue browsing' empty state shown.

results.title: Pagination/Load More for Large Lists
results.notes: Requires list with 11+ items; not seeded within suite time. Recommend dedicated test data fixture.

results.title: Shared List - Team Member Views Items
results.notes: Requires User B in same org.

results.title: Shared List - Edit Items Visible to Other Members
results.notes: Requires User B in same org.

results.title: Shared List - Remove Shared Access
results.notes: Cross-user verification requires User B. For 'Anyone (readonly)', toggle-back is broken — see BUG-007-001.

results.title: Shared Indicator Displayed
results.notes: /account/lists tiles: Shared (people icon + 'Shared') vs Private (lock icon + 'Private') — visually distinct, readable. Caveat: 'Anyone (readonly)' and 'Organization' share identical badge — no differentiation.

results.title: Add Entire List to Cart - All Items Added
results.notes: Verified in B2C-LIST-005 with 2 items: 'Successfully added 2' modal, items remain in list, cart count matches. SKU/name/qty visible in result table.

results.title: Add List to Cart - Out of Stock Partial Add
results.notes: Requires mixed in-stock + OOS list (same blocker as B2C-LIST-014).

results.title: Add List to Cart - Preserves Quantities
results.notes: Set Coca Cola qty=3 in WishB list (Save changes confirmation); Add all to cart. Result modal: Quantity 3. Cart confirms qty=3, subtotal $51 = 3×$17. Quantities preserved.
